commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=9f21bbf8c4777ee507b9ce0afab46bdcceed25e1)
commands.review_summary:
The PR moves shell-completion doctor lint and repair into the internal runnable health-check flow while adding focused doctor health-check tests.

PR surface: Source +171, Tests +353. Total +524 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of the PR head shows the changed registry signatures are re-exported by `openclaw/plugin-sdk/health`, which is enough to reproduce the SDK-boundary regression without executing the CLI.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs contributor proof and a maintainer-visible SDK-boundary fix before merge; no automated repair lane is selected while real behavior proof is missing.

target.title: Doctor: structure shell completion repair
target.body:
## Summary

This is the intentionally small doctor repair migration example.

- keeps the public doctor/plugin SDK contracts unchanged
- keeps normal `openclaw doctor` shell-completion behavior on the existing `doctorShellCompletion()` path
- adds a core health check for shell completion so lint can report slow dynamic completion and missing completion caches
- lets `openclaw doctor --fix` run shell completion through the structured repair runner
- keeps shell completion out of the broad structured repair pass so the positional doctor contribution still controls ordering and presentation

The shape is meant to be the repeatable pattern for low-risk doctor migrations: same rule behavior, small internal wrapper, tests doing most of the work.

Diff shape after rebuilding on current `main`:

- 9 files changed
- 623 insertions, 99 deletions
- production code: 282 insertions, 98 deletions
- tests: 341 insertions, 1 deletion

## Verification

- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/commands/doctor-completion.ts src/commands/doctor-completion.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/doctor-lint-flow.ts src/flows/doctor-lint-flow.test.ts src/flows/doctor-repair-flow.ts src/flows/health-check-registry.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/commands/doctor-completion.ts src/commands/doctor-completion.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/doctor-lint-flow.ts src/flows/doctor-lint-flow.test.ts src/flows/doctor-repair-flow.ts src/flows/health-check-registry.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-completion.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/doctor-lint-flow.test.ts src/flows/doctor-repair-flow.test.ts --reporter=dot` - 5 files, 53 tests
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --noEmit --incremental false --pretty false`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --noEmit --incremental false --pretty false`
- `bash /mnt/c/src/claws-hapi/.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` - clean, no accepted/actionable findings
target.author: giodl73-repo
